component.name: GSE Profiler
component.summary: Debug, profile and manage GNOME Shell extensions

description.p: GSE Profiler is a GTK4 desktop application for managing, debugging, and profiling GNOME Shell extensions. It communicates with a bridge extension running inside gnome-shell to provide live function timing, a flame graph visualizer, a filterable log viewer, and a read-only state inspector.

ul.li: Extension manager with enable/disable toggle and state badges
Live log viewer with UUID filter, log-level filter, and full-text search
Flame graph profiler with per-function highlighting and call table
Inspector for browsing extension stateObj properties at runtime

screenshot.caption: Flame graph profiler with per-function highlighting and call table
Swimlane view showing when and how often each function runs
Histogram ranking functions by self-time to find where time is spent
Extension manager with enable/disable toggles and state badges
Live log viewer with UUID and log-level filtering
